_meta.description: Preset agent list. The v1 DUMMY became the real Ellen Joe on 2026-07-14 (same key-for-key stats, game-validated; kit + Potential added). Optional 'potential' block (Potential Awakening, mindscape-like): {name, note, levels {'1'..'6'}} - levels REPLACE each other (activate at most one); effects may carry 'at_max_stacks': true to fire only at the buff's full stack count, unmultiplied. Roster includes the Phase 5 anomaly teams. Phase 5 agents' stats are stored as published (see sources.md Phase 5 caveat: some tables may already include core bonuses - panel-check before trusting; Evelyn's stats were datamine-corrected 2026-07-14: raw base ATK 854 at Lv. 60 (134 + 59 x 8.1654 growth + 239 promotion - the earlier 779 wrongly assumed the published 854 included the +75 core flat), AM 92, AP 90). AFTERSHOCK (added 2026-07-15): a skill-type tag ('aftershock' in constants.json skill_tags) for the Aftershock mechanic (Anby S / Trigger). The datamine gives many Aftershock hits TWO types (Trigger's Harmonizing Shot = Basic + Aftershock; Anby S's Chain/Ultimate also count as Aftershock via her ability) - DUAL-TYPE SUPPORT: a hit keeps its own skill tag AND can be flagged 'counts_as_aftershock' (UI checkbox / CLI prompt), so BOTH tags' gated bonuses apply to the same hit (e.g. Anby S's Ultimate takes Ultimate DMG% and Aftershock DMG% together). Pure Aftershock hits (White Thunder, Thunder Smite) just use the 'aftershock' tag. core_skill_bonuses may also carry 'crit_dmg' (Seed +28.8%), added to base CRIT DMG exactly like core crit_rate adds to base CRIT Rate.
_meta.conventions: Percent stats are fractions (0.24 = 24%). 'core_skill_bonuses' are the max-rank (F) core enhancement stat boosts; base_atk there is FLAT base ATK added to the agent's own base (it scales with ATK%). 'default_engine' is a key into data/engines.json — engines are a separate database so builds can swap them freely. Optional 'core_passive' and 'mindscapes' ('1'..'6') document the agent's kit: entries WITH an 'effects' list are modeled conditionals (kinds: crit_rate, crit_dmg, dmg_bonus, res_shred, dmg_taken, flat_atk, atk_pct, daze_bonus, anomaly_buff, disorder_mult_add, anomaly_proficiency, pen_ratio, sheer_force, hp_pct, sheer_dmg, def_red; value per stack; max_stacks 1 = on/off checkbox), asked at runtime. RUPTURE (Phase 5 Rupture): 'core_skill_bonuses.base_hp' is FLAT base HP (scales with HP%, like base_atk with ATK%); 'sheer_force_hp_conversion' is the agent's HP -> Sheer Force rate (Yixuan 0.10, absent/0 for everyone else); 'sheer_force' effects add flat Sheer Force, 'hp_pct' joins the combat Max-HP% bracket, 'sheer_dmg' joins the dedicated Sheer DMG bracket, 'def_red' reduces enemy DEF (multiplicative with PEN Ratio; irrelevant to Sheer damage, which ignores DEF). Effect gates: 'skill_tag' limits an effect to that damage type; 'modes' limits it to calculation modes (direct/anomaly/disorder/vortex; absent = all); 'element' limits it to damage dealt as that element (an effect explicitly listing a disorder/vortex mode skips the element check there, since those bursts deal another element by design; effects without 'modes' stay element-checked everywhere). 'anomaly_buff' joins the separate Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket; 'disorder_mult_add' adds to the Disorder/Vortex burst base multiplier; 'anomaly_proficiency' is flat AP. PROJECT CONVENTION: only mindscapes that buff stats/DMG or debuff the enemy are modeled; motion-value/energy/QoL mindscapes are documented with a note but never modeled (the user enters multipliers manually).

ABLOOM CALC (her signature; AP-SCALING, unlike Velina's fixed MV): Featherbloom on an anomalous target deals a SEPARATE instance = (MV% per 10 AP) x (the ORIGINAL anomaly's per-proc DMG). MV per element at max core: Ether 6.15 / Electric 3.2 / Fire 8 / Physical 0.75 / Ice 1.08 / Wind 0.32 (x1.3 with her M2). Recipe - run ANOMALY mode as the anomaly's element with the multiplier OVERRIDE = anomaly_base_mult x (MV/100) x (AP/10). Base mults: Corruption(ether) 0.625, Shock(electric) 1.25, Burn(fire) 0.50, Assault(physical) 7.13, Shatter(ice) 5.0, Windswept(wind) 12.5. EXAMPLE - Ether Corruption, Vivian AP 446: override = 0.625 x 0.0615 x 44.6 = 1.714 (the Abloom is ~2.74x the Corruption at that AP). Note: the 'per 10 AP' scales with VIVIAN's AP; the 'original anomaly DMG' uses whoever applied it (usually Vivian's own Corruption, so same AP).
